axes.name: Text Fit
axes.description: No text overflow, truncation, or bad line breaks. All text readable.

axes.name: Layout Balance
axes.description: Elements evenly spaced. No large empty areas or crowding. Visual hierarchy clear.

axes.name: Color & Contrast
axes.description: All text visible against background. No invisible text. Consistent palette.

axes.name: Image Quality
axes.description: No white bounding boxes, stretched images, or missing placeholders. Photos clean.

axes.name: Data Accuracy
axes.description: Numbers match SPEC. No placeholder text. Dates correct (TBD where needed).

axes.name: Professionalism
axes.description: Would a 50s exec take this seriously? Clean, corporate, no amateur elements.

scoring: 1-10 per axis. Weighted average must >= pass_threshold. Any axis < 5 = auto-fail.
